title: Cinematic Minecraft
description: Explore the whole new world of Minecraft with the Exposure camera mod and new world gen mods! This mod pack also features some optimization mods with support for shaders as well!
body:
With the mods in this modpack, Minecraft is a whole new game. It allows you to take pictures with a camera mod known as Exposure, better performance with things like Sodium, new biomes with 2 different mods, and even shader support using Iris!

This modpack is going to only be in 1.20+ and will not be downgraded.
